query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of an empty paved street extending toward the horizon, illuminated by a line of overhead street lamps on both sides that produce bright starburst glows. The air appears hazy, reducing visibility in the distance. A chain-link fence borders the right side of the road, while a sidewalk, trees, and faint structures are visible on the left. The textured asphalt surface shows seams and cracks in the foreground, and the scene is devoid of people or vehicles.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime view of an empty paved street extending toward the horizon under a sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor cast. A line of overhead street lamps on both sides emits harsh starburst glows that illuminate the foggy air, creating an atmosphere of unease and isolation. A chain-link fence borders the right side, while darkened trees and obscured structures lurk in deep shadow on the left. The textured asphalt shows seams in the foreground, but visibility collapses into a murky vanishing point ahead, evoking a sense of dread and atmospheric distress.
